expectations.text: Response focuses on project CLAUDE.md, does not propose changes to global agents/skills
expectations.evidence: Focuses only on project CLAUDE.md content

expectations.text: Response shows current token count of project CLAUDE.md
expectations.evidence: Does not use tiktoken or provide exact token count. Only estimates '1,500-1,800 tokens' from character count heuristics

expectations.text: Response identifies Korean content as optimization target
expectations.evidence: Does not identify Korean as the primary issue. Instead focuses on structural compression (removing boilerplate, table→list conversion)

expectations.text: Response proposes English translation of Korean content
expectations.evidence: Does not propose Korean→English conversion at all. Focuses on content restructuring
